version_pin_rationale: Pin fzf >= 0.60.0 — fzf 0.55.0 (built with Go 1.22) crashes silently under Darling 0.1.20260609 (exit 1, empty stdout). The Go-1.22 macOS TLV / pthread emulation path trips an unimplemented Darling syscall. fzf 0.60.0 (Go 1.23) is the first known-good release. The 0.55.0 binary is reserved as a Darling-loader-regression canary; see recipes/catalog/macos/fzf-0.55-canary.json. DO NOT downgrade without re-verifying under Darling.
